name: ds-contrast-violation
description: Stage 4 / M3 fixture: css/tokens are structurally valid, but under one context's token resolution the foreground/background pair would fail WCAG 2.1 AA contrast. Rendered contrast checking is out of scope for M2 (requires a live tree per constraint-enforcement-spec.md Section 1 Stage 4); this fixture exists so the Stage 4 accessibility module has a known case to exercise in M3.

constraints.rationale: Contrast must pass under both context token resolutions independently.
